titleStmt.title: SII 27.218: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 218. (A.R. No. 577 of 1929-30.) KOḌAVŪRU (MALPE), UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in a field adjacent to the temple called Kallu-maṭha

This record registers the remission of taxes like samudāya and beḍaṁgoḷu collected upon the land belonging to Kṛishṇa Nāṇilitāya situated in Kuḍevūru adhivāsa of the village Śivaḷḷi, by the Queen when she was giving audience in the palace at Bārahakanyāpura, in the presence of all the prādhāna, dēśi-purusha and bāhattaraniyōgi.
It is dated Śaka 1210, Sarvajit, Tulā (Tula) 24, Wednesday corresponding to 1287 A.D., October 24.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīmatu paṭṭada piriyarasiyaru ballamahādē
viyaru vijayarājya muttarōttarābhi pravardha mā
namā caṁdrākkatāraṁbaraṁ salutta virda sakavaruṣa
1210 neya sarvvajitu saṁvatsarada tolāmāsa
24 neya . bu . bārahakanyāpurada Aramaneyalu stira siṁhāsa
nārūḍharāgi vaḍḍōlagaṁ goṭṭiralu samasta pradhā
naruṁ dēśipuruṣaru bāhattaraniyōgagaḷu viralu Ā balla
mahādēviyaru śivaḷiya grāmadoḷage kuḍevūra Adhivāsa
dalu kṛṣṇanāṇilitāyana bāḷiṁge baṁda teṟu Āṟuhaṇavina moda
liṁge baṁda samudāya beḍaṁgoḷu Adhikāra mariyāde mēlāya
sahitavāgi yinisanu kādaru yidakāha Ā rānobba
Aḷidava śrīvāraṇāsiyalu nūṟakavi
leya vadhisida dōṣa subhamaṁgaḷa śrī
śrī koṭīśvara
Digital edition of SII 27.218 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
